'''Kamarkiia''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] in the [[Wartaki]] continent on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] it was abandoned by the Wookiees. It was also the location of the sacred vaults of [[Neocomora]], which were thought destroyed during the initial [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] occupation until they were discovered by the [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] thief [[Kea Ra-Lan]].<ref name="Journal" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kamarkiia was first mentioned in [[1996]]'s [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 10|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 10]].<ref name="Journal" />
